creator: xenomorph@gmail.com
text:
I don't mean to beat a dead horse, but this is still in 9.2-RELEASE-p12.

-----

# freebsd-update fetch
Looking up update.FreeBSD.org mirrors... 5 mirrors found.
Fetching metadata signature for 9.2-RELEASE from update5.freebsd.org... done.
Fetching metadata index... done.
Inspecting system... done.
Preparing to download files... done.

The following files will be updated as part of updating to 9.2-RELEASE-p12:
/boot/kernel/linker.hints

-----

I plan on moving to FreeBSD 9.3 "soon", but I'm troubled that this issue was introduced and then went unfixed in FreeBSD 9.2 for so long.
